data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: BUB-1 targets PP2A:B56 to regulates chromosome congression during meiosis I in C. elegans oocytes
project.projectDescription: This project consisted in identifying phosphorylated residues in BUB-1 in C. elegans embryo extract. This is part of our general interest in identifying PTMs playing a role during meiosis.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: IP samples were processed through SDS-PAGE (NuPAGE 4-12% + MOP Buffer. Gel bands excised, destained and in-gel reductively alkylated with DTT/IAA prior to in-gel overnight trypsin digestion. Peptides extracted and samples analysed by nLC-MS/MS on Q-Exactive Plus for protein identification. Peptides from gel band GFP-Top enriched for phosphopeptides using a Zr-IMAC support (Resyn Biosciences)prior to analysis by nLC-MS/MS on a Q-Exactive Plus.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Data Analysis:Gel bands Q Exactive™ Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap™ .RAW data files were extracted and converted to mascot generic files (.mgf) using MSC Convert. Extracted data then searched against Caenorhabditis elegans & Local Peptide (sequence provided by researcher) databases using the Mascot Search Engine (Mascot Daemon Version 2.3.2).   Search Parameters used for Search Type of search          : MS/MS Ion Search Enzyme                   : Trypsin/P Fixed modifications     : Carbamidomethyl (C) Variable modifications  : Acetyl (N-term), Dioxidation (M), Gln->pyro-Glu (N-term Q) and Oxidation (M), Deamidation (NQ) Mass values              : Monoisotopic Protein Mass            : Unrestricted Peptide Mass Tolerance : ± 10 ppm (# 13C = 2) Fragment Mass Tolerance : ± 0.06 Da Max Missed Cleavages   : 2 Instrument type         : ESI-TRAP  Phosphopeptide Enriched Sample (GFP-Top) Data Analysis: Q Exactive™ Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap™ .RAW data files were extracted and converted to mascot generic files (.mgf) using MSC Convert. Extracted data then searched against Caenorhabditis elegans & Local Peptide (sequence provided by researcher) databases using the Mascot Search Engine (Mascot Daemon Version 2.3.2).   Search Parameters used for Search Type of search          : MS/MS Ion Search Enzyme                   : Trypsin/P Fixed modifications     : Carbamidomethyl (C) Variable modifications  : Acetyl (N-term), Dioxidation (M), Gln->pyro-Glu (N-term Q) and Oxidation (M), Deamidation (NQ), Phosphorylation (STY) Mass values              : Monoisotopic Protein Mass            : Unrestricted Peptide Mass Tolerance : ± 10 ppm (# 13C = 2) Fragment Mass Tolerance : ± 0.06 Da Max Missed Cleavages   : 2 Instrument type         : ESI-TRAP

experimentTypes.name: Affinity purification coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

references.referenceLine: Bel Borja L, Soubigou F, Taylor SJP, Fraguas Bringas C, Budrewicz J, Lara-Gonzalez P, Sorensen Turpin CG, Bembenek JN, Cheerambathur DK, Pelisch F. BUB-1 targets PP2A:B56 to regulate chromosome congression during meiosis I in C. elegans oocytes. Elife. 2020 9

Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: immunoprecipitated material was digested with trypsin, peptides analysed by mass spectrometry and searches conducted for peptides containing phosphorylated adducts
Trypsin solution (12.5 µg/ml stock in 20 mM ammonium bicarbonate) was added to cover the gel pieces and incubated for 30 min on a shaking platform and incubated sample overnight at 30°C on a shaker
Characteristics[ReductionReagent]: Samples were reduced with 10 mM DTT in 20 mM ammonium bicarbonate
Characteristics[AlkylationReagent]: alkilated with 50 mM IAA (iodoacetamide) in 20 mM ammonium bicarbonate
Comment[Instrument]: Q-Exactive Plus Mass Spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
Comment[Separation]: Peptides initially trapped on an Acclaim PepMap 100 (Thermo Fisher Scientific) and then separated on an Easy-Spray PepMap RSLC C18 column (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages]: Maximum number of missed cleavages was 2.
